Cost line, not revenue.

Cost line, not revenue.

candidates.why: Too broad; includes COGS and other operating items, so not appropriate when explicit SG&A exists.
Component of SG&A but not as complete as the explicit populated SG&A total row.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Valid SG&A component, but explicit populated SG&A row exists and rule says prefer only that row.
R&D line exists, but SG&A total appears to already include R&D based on the separate 'excluding Research & Development' row.
Not SG&A; non-operating.
Section/header, not expense row.
R&D supplemental disclosure, not the best primary SG&A mapping when explicit SG&A total exists.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A excluding R&D line, but for PROF we want SG&A inclusive of R&D when separately tracked so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD works properly.

variables.notes: Best match is the explicit populated row 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total', but it was not included in the candidate list. Chosen from the full preview per instructions. It appears to include R&D because 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses' plus the R&D supplemental amount reconciles to the SG&A total. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense row above EBIT; preferred by placement rule even though preview values are blank.
Section/header, not the expense line itself.
Useful fallback because it is populated, but it appears in supplemental section below EBIT so lower priority than the dedicated above-EBIT row.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Not an R&D expense row; it is SG&A excluding R&D.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Expensed & Capitalized - Total - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental R&D disclosure and reasonable fallback if primary label is missing in some years.

final_choice.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Expensed & Capitalized - Total - Supplemental

variables.notes: Preferred the dedicated above-EBIT R&D line first. Did not add a separate R&D row to XSGA_COMPONENTS because the selected SG&A total appears already to include R&D.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Strong interest expense line and better than gross financing cost because it excludes capitalized interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
candidates.why: Interest-related but gross and less preferred than standard interest expense.

candidates.why: Only lease-interest component, not full interest expense.
Clean standardized interest expense label; best priority choice.
Net interest measure, acceptable fallback if pure interest expense unavailable.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
